0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Temporal Knowledge Graph"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The graph structure underlying Semantic Memory, enabling time-aware queries over subject-predicate-object triples."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Structure"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\ngraph LR\n  A[Alice] -->|prefers_language| B[Go]\n  A -->|works_on| C[Project Alpha]\n  C -->|has_deadline| D[2026-05-01]\n  C -->|depends_on| E[Auth Service]\n  E -->|maintained_by| F[Bob]\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Temporal Dimensions"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Every triple has temporal metadata:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]}],": When the relationship became true"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}]}],": How certain we are about this fact"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]}],": Which source this triple was added from"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Query Patterns"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore.query()"}]," method supports filtering by subject, predicate, object, and point-in-time via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"as_of"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Direct Lookup"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.semantic import TripleStore\n\nts = TripleStore(db_path=\"mnemosyne.db\")\n\n# Who works on Project Alpha?\nresults = ts.query(predicate=\"works_on\", object=\"Project Alpha\")\n# > Alice\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Pattern Matching"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# All relationships involving Alice\nresults = ts.query(subject=\"Alice\")\n\n# All reports_to relationships\nresults = ts.query(predicate=\"reports_to\")\n\n# Specific triple\nresults = ts.query(subject=\"Alice\", predicate=\"prefers_language\", object=\"Go\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Temporal Filtering"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# What were Alice's preferences as of March 1?\nresults = ts.query(\n  subject=\"Alice\",\n  predicate=\"prefers_language\",\n  as_of=\"2026-03-01\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"as_of"}]," parameter filters to only triples whose ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]," is on or before the given date."]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Implementation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The graph is stored in SQLite with:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Triples table"}],": Subject, predicate, object with temporal validity and confidence"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Indices"}],": Subject, predicate, object, and time-range indexes"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"No external graph database is required."}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Note"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["The TripleStore does not currently support multi-hop graph traversal or graph statistics queries. Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query()"}]," with specific subject/predicate/object filters to retrieve relationships."]}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js","async":true}]],["$","$L5",null,{"children":["$","$6",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@7"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"NyLeGfZBPFklBiPyv7L9J"}
